Appearances:
Plaintiff Kin Wing Szeto is present.
Attorney Steven MacDonald appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Andrea J. Holliman is present.
Attorney Jessica Alexandra representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mike Lee , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Aug -13-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
